title: India’s first GenAI unicorn shifts to cloud services as AI model ambitions face reality
slides: GenAI unicorn pivots from models to cloud services.
Building AI models proved too costly and complex.
Cloud services offer steady revenue and lower risk.
Now they sell AI tools for businesses.
Example: custom chatbots for Indian firms.
thread_text: A GenAI unicorn just admitted building AI models was a mistake. They pivoted to selling cloud services instead.
The cost and complexity of training models from scratch crushed their runway. Even VCs got scared.
Now they sell AI tools to businesses. Predictable revenue. Lower risk. Real customers paying monthly.
They're building custom chatbots for Indian firms. No hype, just solving real problems with existing tech.
The lesson? The gold rush isn't in building the models. It's in selling the shovels.
video_script: So this AI unicorn just did a huge pivot.
Building models was way too expensive and hard.
Now they're selling cloud services instead.
Think custom chatbots for Indian businesses.
They went from hype to real revenue.
